title: CREEPER PRATICE
description: A modern PvP practice plugin with duels, arenas, kits, and GUI-based gameplay.
body:
# ⚔️ CreeperPractice ⚔️
## Modern PvP Practice Plugin for Competitive Minecraft Servers

CreeperPractice is a fast, lightweight, and modern PvP practice plugin focused on smooth gameplay, clean GUIs, and high performance. Designed for competitive servers that want a polished player experience without unnecessary complexity.

---

## 🚀 Main Features

### ⚔️ Duel System
- Clean GUI-based duels  
- Fast accept/deny system  
- Smooth match startup  

### 📥 Queue System
- Ranked & Unranked queues  
- Automatic matchmaking  
- Kit-based queue support  

### 🗺️ Arena Management
- Easy arena setup GUI  
- Multiple arena support  
- Fast editing tools  

### 🎒 Advanced Kit Editor
- Full inventory saving  
- Armor & potion support  
- Hotbar-accessible editor  

### 🏠 Premium Lobby System
- Queue selector  
- Kit editor access  
- Settings menu  
- Protected hotbar items  

### 🖥️ Player Settings Menu
Toggle player preferences with a clean double-chest GUI:
- Duel requests  
- Scoreboards  
- Sounds  
- Visibility settings  

---

## 💡 Why CreeperPractice?

### ⚡ Optimized Performance
Built with performance-focused systems to maintain stable TPS during heavy PvP activity.

### 🖱️ GUI-First Design
Everything is handled through intuitive menus instead of command-heavy systems.

### ✅ Reliable Match Logic
Fixes common practice-plugin issues like:
- Inventory ghosting  
- Queue desync  
- Double messages  
- Arena loading bugs  

---

## 🚧 Upcoming Features
- 🎉 Party System  
- 👀 Spectator Mode  
- 🌍 FFA Arenas  

---

# ⚔️ CreeperPractice
### Competitive PvP perfected by **MASTER NAMAN** 😈
